issues.msg: Only 49.7% positive deltas -- benefit scenarios not predominant
Report claims residual std=0.93 for Synergy model but no residual_stats file found
issues.detail: This figure cannot be directly verified without saved residual data. Plausible given R2=0.996, but cannot be confirmed independently.

issues.msg: Cmax direction only 38% positive -- contradicts clinical expectation!
ctDNA VAF negative attribution only 35% -- weaker than expected
Monotonicity test (SV-2) not independently run -- report makes untested claim
issues.detail: The report states "Pritamab 기반 arm에서 PrPc 기여도 단조 증가 확인" but no saved result file documents this test. Must run and save to confirm.

issues.msg: Ablation test (SV-3) result (-1.8 months for Cmax removal) not independently verifiable
issues.detail: No saved ablation_results file. This figure cannot be confirmed. Run and save ablation.

issues.msg: Convergence Index is defined in report but no saved output file exists
issues.detail: The report describes the formula but never shows actual Convergence Index values for any patient. This is a forward-looking proposal, not demonstrated data. Must add convergence_index_results.json to validate the claim.
